messages.content: GFEBS question “In addition to personnel, work centers are created for specific equipment such as cranes and backhoes, or for groups of equipment so that usage rates and ______ can take place” please provide correct answer of the following options: capacity planning, resource planning, equipment rationing and equipment accountability.
resource planning

GFEBS question please provide right answer  "When creating a Demand Maintenance Order (DMO), the description of the problem should _____. 
Describe how to fix the problem    Describe the required repairs needed    Be a description of the problem by the customer    Be entered by the technician once the order is completed "
Be a description of the problem by the customer.

In the work order process, which role is responsible for planning the labor, equipment, and material requirements needed to perform work. 
The Order Approver    Physical Inventory Maintainer    The Work Order Processor    The Work Notification Processor
The Work Order Processor is responsible for planning the labor, equipment, and material requirements needed to perform work.

Which of the following is NOT a method of adding components necessary to complete an order? 
Add from stock items    Salvage components from another item    From a Government Purchase Card (GPC) transaction    Through the purchase requisition and Standard Procurement System (SPS) process
Salvage components from another item is NOT a method of adding components necessary to complete an order.

Which of the following is NOT a category of components for plant maintenance orders? 
Text items    Stock items    Non-stock items    Commercial items
Commercial items is NOT a category of components for plant maintenance orders.

A work breakdown structure (WBS) can be added when the notification is created or when the order is _____. 
Closed    Settled    Created    Executed
Created.

Work order labor cost is posted to the work order using the work center to cost center ______ rate. 
Activity    Transfer    Standard    Overhead
Standard.

Which role converts a work notification into the appropriate work order type? 
The Order Processor    The Order Approver    The Notification Approver    The Notification Maintainer
The Order Processor converts a work notification into the appropriate work order type.

When a quality assurance check on an order results in required rework, the first step is to remove the ______ status. 
Settlement (SETC)    Confirmation (CNF)    Partial Confirmation (PCNF)    Technically complete (TECO)
Technically complete (TECO) status.

In GFEBS, Notification numbers and Work Order number always contain how many characters? 
6    8    10    12

Issuing material to a work order is accomplished using a(n) ______ transaction. 
Acquire material    Goods movement    Material placement    Component transfer
Goods movement.

Printing a maintenance order is not actually printing the order, but printing a hardcopy of any of the available _____ for the maintenance orders. 
Permits    Shop papers    Notifications    Standard Operating Orders
Shop papers.

Which of the following is the funding structure used to associate Demand Maintenance Orders (DMO) and Preventive Maintenance Orders (PMO) to the correct line of accounting? 
Individual Job Order (IJO) WBS    Common Level of Support (CLS) WBS structure    Maintenance Funding Execution Structure (MFES)    Above Common Level of Support (ACLS) WBS structure
Maintenance Funding Execution Structure (MFES).

A work center is a(n) _____ that executes a work request. 
Organization    Single function    Collection of resources (personnel/equipment)    Directorate on an installation
Collection of resources (personnel/equipment).

Criteria used for creating a report can be stored as ______. 
Filters    Sorting    Formats    Variants
Variants.

When reviewing a maintenance order, the specific items (materials) used in the repair/maintenance of the major component or asset are located under the _____ tab. 
Objects    Operations    Components    Additional Data
Components.
